stimulus:
Welcome

Thank you for taking part. In this study we will ask you to answer a few short questions about your everyday life.

It should take roughly 15 minutes.

Press the spacebar (or Enter) to continue.

Before we begin

  • Please turn off your mobile phone.
  • Please make sure you're in a quiet environment.

We need your full attention. Thank you for participation.

Click "Continue" to enter full screen.

About these questions

We will ask you a few questions. Please answer as truthfully as you can.

About these questions

We will ask you a few questions. Please answer as truthfully as you can.

There's no rush. This is a short study. Take your time.

About these questions

A couple of things to note

Let's start

We're about to begin. Good luck!

Press the spacebar to begin.

End of the first part

Great — you have finished the first part of the study.

Please take a moment to rest before you continue.

Click "Continue" for the next part.

Second part

Now we have a second part of the study. Here we will ask you which one of two problems is worse for you.

Second part

Now we have a second part of the study. Here we will ask you which one of two problems is worse for you.

Each time we will show you two of the problems that can affect people's mood. Please select, with the cursor, the one that has been bothering you more during the last two weeks by clicking on it.

Second part

Now we have a second part of the study. Here we will ask you which one of two problems is worse for you.

Each time we will show you two of the problems that can affect people's mood. Please select, with the cursor, the one that has been bothering you more during the last two weeks by clicking on it.

Please concentrate and try your best to select the one that has been bothering you more, even if the difference is only minor.

Second part

If the two problems feel extremely equal — beyond any ability to choose one — you can press the spacebar to skip, but please try not to.
